ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average user rating for the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the movie */,
  "screenwriter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the screenwriter of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the movie */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or catchphrase for the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's poster image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's trailer video */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Official release date of the movie */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_screenwriter_id FOREIGN KEY ("screenwriter_id") REFERENCES screenwriters ("screenwriter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streaming service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the streaming service */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the service */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the streaming service's official website */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the streaming service is based */,
  "subscription_fee" REAL /* Monthly subscription fee */,
  "number_of_subscribers" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_streaming" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streaming service */,
  "availability_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie became available on the service */,
  "availability_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie will no longer be available on the service */,
  "exclusive" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the movie is exclusively available on the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the director */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the director belongs to */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screenwriters" (
  "screenwriter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screenwriter */,
  "screenwriter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the screenwriter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the screenwriter */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the screenwriter belongs to */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the screenwriter */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the screenwriter */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the screenwriter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screenwriter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the role belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_roles" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person filling the role */,
  "role_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the person started the role */,
  "role_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the person ended the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "role_id", "person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, critic) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of user subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating value provided by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Textual review provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., platform, external site) */,
  "rating_weight" REAL /* Weight of the rating for aggregated scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
